business.name: Handyman and plumbing services by Blake LLC

homepage.heroSubline: Philadelphia homes deserve expert care. Get trusted handyman and plumbing solutions from Blake LLC.
aboutText: Blake LLC started with a simple goal: to provide honest and reliable handyman services to our neighbors in Philadelphia. We understand the unique challenges of maintaining homes in this historic city, from aging rowhouses to modern condos.

We believe in clear communication, fair pricing, and quality workmanship. Our team is committed to treating your home with the same respect and care as we would our own. We take pride in getting the job done right, the first time.

Blake LLC is proud to be a part of the Philadelphia community. We actively support local initiatives and strive to build lasting relationships with our clients. When you choose us, you're choosing a neighbor who cares.

valueProps.title: Experienced Professionals
valueProps.description: Our team has years of experience handling a wide range of handyman and plumbing tasks.

valueProps.title: Prompt & Reliable
valueProps.description: We arrive on time and complete projects efficiently, minimizing disruption to your daily life.

valueProps.title: Transparent Pricing
valueProps.description: You'll receive a clear and detailed estimate before any work begins, with no hidden fees.

valueProps.title: Quality Guaranteed
valueProps.description: We stand behind our workmanship and ensure your complete satisfaction.

homepage.ctaSubline: Let's discuss your project and provide you with a personalized quote.

services.name: General Handyman Services
services.shortDescription: From minor repairs to major renovations, we handle all your home maintenance needs.
services.description:
Blake LLC offers a comprehensive range of general handyman services to keep your Philadelphia home in top condition. We understand that maintaining a property, especially older row homes common in neighborhoods like Fishtown and Northern Liberties, can present unique challenges. Our experienced team is equipped to handle everything from patching drywall and fixing leaky faucets to installing new fixtures and assembling furniture.

We pay close attention to detail and use quality materials to ensure lasting results. Whether you need help with a small repair or a larger home improvement project, we're committed to providing exceptional service and exceeding your expectations. We are equipped to handle the specific needs of Philadelphia homes, including addressing issues caused by the freeze-thaw cycle that can damage masonry and foundations.

Our services include but are not limited to: carpentry, drywall repair, painting, minor plumbing repairs, fixture installation, furniture assembly, and general maintenance tasks. We're here to help you keep your home safe, functional, and beautiful.
process: Step 1: Contact us to discuss your project and schedule a consultation.
Step 2: We'll provide a detailed estimate and answer any questions you may have.
Step 3: Our team will arrive on time and complete the work efficiently and professionally.
Step 4: We'll ensure your complete satisfaction before considering the job complete.

faq.question: Do you offer emergency handyman services?
faq.answer: Yes, we understand that some repairs can't wait. We offer emergency handyman services for urgent issues like burst pipes or electrical problems.

faq.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, Blake LLC is fully licensed and insured for your protection and peace of mind. We adhere to all local building codes and safety regulations.

faq.question: How do you determine your pricing?
faq.answer: Our pricing is based on the scope of the project, the materials required, and the time involved. We provide transparent and detailed estimates before any work begins.

services.name: Plumbing Repairs
services.shortDescription: Expert plumbing services for leaks, clogs, and other plumbing issues.
services.description:
From dripping faucets to burst pipes, plumbing problems can cause significant damage to your Philadelphia home. Blake LLC provides reliable plumbing repair services to address any issue quickly and efficiently. We understand the importance of prompt action to prevent water damage and costly repairs. Our experienced plumbers are equipped to handle a wide range of plumbing problems, from simple fixes to complex repairs.

We are familiar with the plumbing systems common in Philadelphia's diverse housing stock, including the older infrastructure often found in areas like South Philly. We can diagnose and repair leaks, clogs, running toilets, and other common plumbing issues. We also offer fixture installation services, including faucets, sinks, toilets, and showers. Our goal is to provide lasting solutions that keep your plumbing system functioning properly.

We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the reliability of our repairs. We also offer preventative maintenance services to help you avoid future plumbing problems. Contact us today for a free estimate on your plumbing repair needs.
process: Step 1: Contact us to describe your plumbing issue.
Step 2: We'll schedule a convenient time for a plumber to assess the problem.
Step 3: We'll provide a detailed estimate for the repair.
Step 4: Our plumber will complete the repair efficiently and professionally.

faq.question: Do you handle emergency plumbing repairs?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer 24/7 emergency plumbing services for urgent issues like burst pipes and major leaks.

faq.question: What are some signs of a plumbing problem?
faq.answer: Common signs include dripping faucets, running toilets, slow drains, low water pressure, and unexplained increases in your water bill.

faq.question: How can I prevent plumbing problems?
faq.answer: Regular maintenance, such as clearing drains and inspecting pipes, can help prevent many plumbing problems. Avoid flushing non-flushable items down the toilet.

services.name: Drywall Repair
services.shortDescription: Seamless drywall repairs for holes, cracks, and water damage.
services.description:
Damaged drywall can detract from the appearance of your Philadelphia home and create potential problems with insulation and structural integrity. Blake LLC offers professional drywall repair services to restore your walls and ceilings to their original condition. Whether you have small holes, cracks, or water damage, our skilled technicians can provide seamless repairs that blend seamlessly with your existing paint and texture.

We understand the importance of proper preparation and attention to detail when repairing drywall. We carefully assess the damage, prepare the surface, and apply the appropriate patching compounds. We then sand the repaired area smooth and prime it for painting. Our goal is to provide a flawless finish that is virtually undetectable.

We use quality materials and proven techniques to ensure the durability of our drywall repairs. We also offer painting services to complete the job and restore your walls to their original beauty. Contact us today for a free estimate on your drywall repair needs.
process: Step 1: We assess the drywall damage and determine the best repair method.
Step 2: We prepare the surface by cleaning and sanding the damaged area.
Step 3: We apply patching compounds and allow them to dry thoroughly.
Step 4: We sand the repaired area smooth and prime it for painting.

faq.question: How do you repair water-damaged drywall?
faq.answer: We first address the source of the water leak. Then, we remove the damaged drywall, replace any affected insulation, and install new drywall. We ensure the area is properly sealed to prevent future water damage.

faq.question: Can you match the existing texture of my drywall?
faq.answer: Yes, our skilled technicians can match a wide range of drywall textures to ensure a seamless repair.

faq.question: How long does drywall repair take?
faq.answer: The time required depends on the extent of the damage. Small repairs can often be completed in a few hours, while larger repairs may take a day or two.

services.name: Furniture Assembly
services.shortDescription: Hassle-free furniture assembly for all types of furniture.
services.description:
Avoid the frustration and time commitment of assembling furniture yourself. Blake LLC provides professional furniture assembly services for all types of furniture, from beds and dressers to desks and bookshelves. We understand that furniture assembly can be challenging, especially with complex instructions and missing parts. Our experienced technicians are equipped to handle any furniture assembly project quickly and efficiently.

We carefully unpack the furniture, inventory the parts, and follow the manufacturer's instructions to ensure proper assembly. We also dispose of the packaging materials, leaving your home clean and clutter-free. Whether you're furnishing a new home in Rittenhouse Square or updating your existing furniture in Manayunk, we can help you save time and avoid the stress of furniture assembly.

We offer competitive pricing and flexible scheduling to meet your needs. Contact us today for a free estimate on your furniture assembly project.
process: Step 1: We unpack the furniture and inventory the parts.
Step 2: We follow the manufacturer's instructions to assemble the furniture.
Step 3: We ensure all parts are properly connected and tightened.
Step 4: We dispose of the packaging materials.

faq.question: What types of furniture do you assemble?
faq.answer: We assemble all types of furniture, including beds, dressers, desks, bookshelves, tables, chairs, and outdoor furniture.

faq.question: Do you assemble furniture from IKEA?
faq.answer: Yes, we have extensive experience assembling furniture from IKEA and other popular furniture retailers.

faq.question: How long does furniture assembly take?
faq.answer: The time required depends on the complexity of the furniture. Simple items can often be assembled in an hour or two, while more complex items may take several hours.

services.name: Painting Services
services.shortDescription: Interior and exterior painting services to refresh your home.
services.description:
A fresh coat of paint can transform the look and feel of your Philadelphia home. Blake LLC offers professional painting services for both interior and exterior surfaces. We understand the importance of proper preparation and quality materials to achieve a lasting and beautiful finish. Our experienced painters are skilled in all aspects of painting, from surface preparation to application of paint.

We carefully prepare the surfaces by cleaning, sanding, and priming them as needed. We use high-quality paints and proven techniques to ensure a smooth and even finish. We also protect your furniture and belongings from paint splatters. Whether you're painting a single room or your entire house, we're committed to providing exceptional service and exceeding your expectations. We understand the unique challenges of painting older homes in Philadelphia, including lead paint abatement and the need for specialized primers.

We offer a wide range of paint colors and finishes to suit your style and preferences. Contact us today for a free estimate on your painting project.
process: Step 1: We prepare the surfaces by cleaning, sanding, and priming them.
Step 2: We apply the paint using brushes, rollers, or sprayers.
Step 3: We apply multiple coats of paint as needed.
Step 4: We clean up the work area and dispose of the painting materials.

faq.question: Do you offer color consultation services?
faq.answer: Yes, we can help you choose the perfect colors for your home.

faq.question: What type of paint do you use?
faq.answer: We use high-quality paints from reputable brands.

faq.question: How long does a painting project take?
faq.answer: The time required depends on the size of the project and the number of coats of paint required.

services.name: Fixture Installation
services.shortDescription: Professional installation of light fixtures, faucets, and other home fixtures.
services.description:
Upgrading your home fixtures can enhance its style, functionality, and energy efficiency. Blake LLC provides professional fixture installation services for light fixtures, faucets, ceiling fans, and other home fixtures. We understand the importance of proper installation to ensure safety and performance. Our experienced technicians are equipped to handle a wide range of fixture installation projects.

We carefully remove the old fixtures and install the new ones according to the manufacturer's instructions. We also ensure that all electrical and plumbing connections are properly made. Whether you're replacing a light fixture in your dining room or installing a new faucet in your kitchen, we can help you get the job done right. We are familiar with the local building codes and regulations in Philadelphia and ensure that all installations meet these requirements.

We offer competitive pricing and flexible scheduling to meet your needs. Contact us today for a free estimate on your fixture installation project.
process: Step 1: We remove the old fixture.
Step 2: We install the new fixture according to the manufacturer's instructions.
Step 3: We make all necessary electrical or plumbing connections.
Step 4: We test the fixture to ensure it is working properly.

faq.question: Do you install ceiling fans?
faq.answer: Yes, we install ceiling fans of all types and sizes.

faq.question: Do you install smart home fixtures?
faq.answer: Yes, we can install smart thermostats, smart lighting, and other smart home fixtures.

faq.question: What if I don't have the necessary tools?
faq.answer: We provide all the necessary tools and equipment for the installation.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Blake fixed a leaky pipe under my sink quickly and efficiently. He was very professional and explained everything clearly. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: David K.
reviews.text: Had a hole in my drywall from a mishap moving furniture. Blake's team patched it up perfectly, you can't even tell there was ever damage. Great job!

reviews.name: Jessica L.
reviews.text: IKEA furniture is always a nightmare for me. Blake assembled a dresser and bed frame in no time. So glad I called them!

reviews.name: Michael B.
reviews.text: Blake helped me with a variety of small repairs around my house, including fixing a loose doorknob and patching some cracks in the walls. He was very thorough and paid attention to detail.

reviews.name: Amy S.
reviews.text: Blake's team painted my living room and did a fantastic job. The color looks great, and the finish is smooth and even. Very happy with the results.

reviews.name: Robert C.
reviews.text: Blake installed a new ceiling fan in my bedroom. He was very careful and made sure everything was working properly. I'm very pleased with the service.
